mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, triggering immediate risk-off positioning that produces negative S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 5d returns are positive in > 55% of instances when UNRATE crosses the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 60d returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which translates into higher corporate profit expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases of > 0.5% coincide with negative 20d SPX returns in > 50% of observations during tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price index levels trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL above 195.0 yields positive 5d SPX returns in > 65% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market expansion, boosting consumer spending forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 20d returns in > 55% of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product reflects sustained economic expansion and corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates above 2% annually fail to predict positive 60d SPX returns with a Rank IC above 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and recession risk, prompting rapid portfolio de-risking that generates negative S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines exceeding 0.4% are followed by positive 5d SPX returns in > 60% of cases.
